article.title: Uber L4 Offer Chances
article.content:
BPS Round :- Was asked 1 medium level DSA question, solved in 45 min :- H/SH

Round 1 (DSA) :- Was asked 1 medium level DSA question, missed few edges cases initially, later completed the question on time :- LH/H

Round 2 (Specialisation) :- Kind of machine coding round, but mostly had discussions and small code changes in the codebase. :- H/SH

Round 3 :- (System Design / Bar Raiser) :- Was asked generic question on instagram feed design. Completed everything within time and interviewer looked satisfied :- H/SH

Round 4 :- (Behavioural / HM) :- Was asked mostly behavioural questions. Interviewer didn't cross question in most of the question. :- H/SH


1. What are the offer chances?
2. what is the in general timeline for the offer in uber after the interviews?
3. How is the current comp. structure in uber for L4?
4. I also have an offer of microsoft L62? so how easy is to negotiate here?


YOE :- 4

post.content: I think you would get the offer.
What is BPS and for which location this expereince is?
can you share the questions asked in interview?
How many days they took to give you final results after HM round?
In Round 3 (System Design / Bar Raiser), do you need to create any diagrams, or is it all verbal? How does that typically work?
Did you have to do Code Signal?

How is the MS 62 offer? Is it comparable?
Is MS offer for remote?
Im also prepping for MS and Uber right now :)
how did you come to know the lh/h/sh ratings? were you informed by recruiter?
Uber offer generally takes 3 to 4 weeks post clearing all the interviews. Some times it might even take 2 months.\nTry getting as many counter offers as possible else they will low ball you
is it for app specific(android / iOS) or backend
For Round 2 (Specialisation)  was working code required or just design the classes with OOPS

your interview experience seems pretty generic given the position and company. Good to hear companies are not always running for unreal DAS questions which they don\'t use at all in daily tasks. I wish you get the offer, all the best.
